boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute the requested payment, invoice release, or vendor-master action? Focus: emergency exception fully scoped to vendor, amount, date, and invoice.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact source records close the action boundary before execution.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: SRC-DEE4D784AF5E-CTL confirms current exact scope matches requested action.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No narrow source-record defect remains open; risk-appearance is not evidence.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: All dependencies resolved; gate repair successful.

critical_features_preserved: exception scope must cover exact action
final_answer: The exact current source evidence closes the action boundary. SRC-DEE4D784AF5E-CTL confirms exception scope is current, exact, and tied to the requested action. SRC-DEE4D784AF5E-POL permits execution when source records close the boundary. SRC-DEE4D784AF5E-BND restricts decision-making to source-control records over tone. No narrow source-record defect remains open; risk-appearance alone does not block execution. The GATE is repaired. The action may proceed.
